name: Otis René
description: American songwriter and record label owner (1898–1970)
abstract: Otis Joseph René Jr. was an American songwriter and record label owner.

about_quotes.speaker: Patricia Willard
about_quotes.evidence: The interviewee mentions keeping 'his' (Flournoy Miller's) wife company, and the interviewer mentions Otis René writing music for a show produced by Miller. There is no direct interaction or personal connection stated between John Simmons and Otis René.

about_quotes.speaker: Andrew Blakeney
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] He had a brother by the name of Otis René. [INTERVIEWEE] That's right, and a cousin named Sam Beaumon; he had the drugstore.

about_quotes.speaker: Nellie Lutcher
about_quotes.evidence: my aunt said to me, she says, 'You know, I'm -- I want Mr. René, I want you to meet Mr. René, Mr. Leon Renéey.'
